---
title: "boundings"
---

IN PROGRESS

This script contains routines for fitting curves where the bouding method has been used

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`plotting/with_plotly/boundings.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/plotting/with_plotly/boundings.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `get_figure` {#get_figure}

```python
def get_figure(t: np.ndarray, y: np.ndarray, dy: np.ndarray, title: str, yaxis_title: str, labels: List[str], legend_title: str, tmin=None, tmax=None, ymin=None, ymax=None, t1_fit=None, t2_fit=None, y_fit=None, dy_fit=None, width=phi_golden * 500, height=500)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/plotting/with_plotly/boundings.py#L14){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
